title: KGBV Ghaziabad – Chowkidar, Cook and More – 26 Posts
shortInfo: Kasturba Gandhi Residential Girls School Ghaziabad (KGBV Ghaziabad) 2026 has been announced for 26 posts such as Principal – 4 vacancies, Lab Assistant – 6 vacancies, Assistant Cook – 3 vacancies, Peon – 2 vacancies and Watchman – 2 vacancies for eligible 8th pass, 10th pass, 12th pass and Graduate/Post Graduate candidates with required qualifications or experience, with the application window offline open up to 31 May 2026 on the official website of District Basic Education Officer Ghaziabad.

basic_details.job_title: KGBV Ghaziabad Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 26 Chowkidar, Cook and More Posts

age_limit.age_details: Not less than 30 years for Principal.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation, B.Ed., Graduation, Intermediate, High School, Class VIII

salary_details.pay_scale: Not less than 30 years for Principal.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KGBV Ghaziabad Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
